message:
fix(observability): replace manual CAS peak-update loop with AtomicU64::fetch_max

src/observability/resource_accounting.rs:
- Replace 7-line compare_exchange_weak loop with single-line fetch_max(),
  which is both simpler and more correct (fetch_max is a single atomic
  RMW operation, eliminating the spurious-failure retry overhead)

audit_index.jsonl: add 4 new audit entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
